name: frootai-mcp
description: The open glue for the GenAI ecosystem — 25 MCP tools spanning architecture guidance, solution plays, primitive management, model comparison, cost estimation, and AI evaluation. Context-wires 830+ primitives (238 agents, 176 instructions, 322 skills, 77 plugins) across 100 solution plays via the FAI Protocol.

tools.name: search_knowledge
tools.description: BM25 search across 16 FROOT knowledge modules

tools.name: get_module
tools.description: Retrieve full module content by ID (F1-T3)

tools.name: get_play_detail
tools.description: Architecture, services, and config for any of 100 plays

tools.name: list_community_plays
tools.description: Browse all 100 solution plays with filters

tools.name: semantic_search_plays
tools.description: Natural language play discovery with BM25 ranking

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Azure cost estimation for any play at dev/prod scale

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: AI model comparison for specific use cases

tools.name: get_model_catalog
tools.description: Azure OpenAI model catalog with pricing

tools.name: agent_review
tools.description: Reviewer agent for security + quality checks

tools.name: run_evaluation
tools.description: Check AI quality scores against thresholds

tools.name: list_modules
tools.description: All 16 modules organized by FROOT layer
